theme.name: Cinematic Void
theme.description: A premium, dark-mode-exclusive streaming interface for Windows desktop. Focuses on immersive, large-scale imagery, auto-hiding controls, and deep, textured shadows rather than flat colors. Content is the hero.

containers.rail: w-full flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory scrollbar-hide py-4
containers.poster: aspect-[2/3] w-40 md:w-48 lg:w-56 shrink-0 relative rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-surface transition-transform duration-300

rules: Full screen hero background with heavy vignette (bg-black/80 to transparent).
Center aligned glassmorphism login card (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10).
Inputs must be pill-shaped or have large rounded corners, dark filled (bg-white/5), no standard borders, subtle focus ring.
Server input defaults to 'gadir.co:80' and should ideally be visually distinct or pre-filled.
Image must take 70vh, with a bottom gradient (from-app bg to transparent) to blend perfectly into the page.
Gradient overlay on the left to ensure text legibility (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent).
Title uses H1 scale, description truncated to 3 lines.
Buttons: Primary 'Play' (solid white, black text), Secondary 'Info' (glass or dark translucent).
Posters must scale up on hover (scale-105 or scale-110) with z-index elevation.
On hover, show a subtle metadata overlay (year, duration, HD badge) at the bottom of the poster.
Hide native scrollbars using CSS ('::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }').
Add smooth left/right scroll buttons that appear only on row hover.
Fullscreen layout by default inside the app window.
Controls must auto-hide after 3 seconds of inactivity.
Control bar: pill-shaped, floating at the bottom with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60).
Progress bar: thin white line, turns brand red on hover.
Icons for Subtitles, Quality, and Fullscreen on the bottom right.
Fixed to the left, dark translucent background.
Icons only by default, expands on hover to show labels.
Active state: bright white text/icon with a left accent border (brand red).

icons.sizing: w-6 h-6 for nav, w-8 h-8 for player controls

hero_backgrounds.description: Moody, cinematic sci-fi landscape. Perfect for Series/Movies hero backdrop.
Stadium lights at night. Perfect for Live TV / Sports hero backdrop.

posters.description: Moody cinematic character shot for movie placeholder.
Urban cinema atmosphere for category placeholders.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT USE INTER OR ROBOTO. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Inject them via Google Fonts.
Ensure the Electron application is configured for a frameless window with custom close/minimize buttons if possible, or standard dark titlebar, to maintain the premium feel.
Implement an Auth context to handle the login to gadir.co. The Xtream Codes API uses HTTP GET requests for authentication and fetching categories/streams.
For the Live TV player, integrate 'mpegts.js' (or hls.js depending on stream format) in a clean wrapper component.
Never use pure black (#000000) for the UI background, use the specified #050505.
Ensure 'scrollbar-hide' class is implemented in the global css or tailwind config to keep horizontal rails clean.
Use standard 'div's and custom CSS for layout; avoid Shadcn Card if it forces padding, as cinematic posters must go edge-to-edge.
For the login screen, use a Shadcn Form but heavily customize the inputs to be dark and pill-shaped.
